description: This Open House template is part of the higher education series that offers colleges and universities a professional no code communications campaign. Customize these templates with school colors, logos, and photos to generate enthusiasm with future students, community members, alumni, faculty, and parents. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: A team of passionate designers, marketers, and technologists with an understanding that great design inspires action. At Beefree, we’re committed to creating responsive, mobile-friendly, and high-converting templates that empower teams to get more done with less time.
